title: Package, CLI, API, Configuration, Async Lifecycle, and Deployment · Runtime Lens: Deployment Identity
summary: The agent is one script with import-time clients, embedded keys, no health distinction, inconsistent CLI and API behavior, mutable model defaults, and no graceful shutdown. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the deployment identity increment in installable operable Python agent service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit th…
objectives: Bind revision, package, dependency lock, policy, model config, eval set, artifact digest, environment, migration, and rollback identity.
Create and close provider, tool, persistence, telemetry, and task resources in explicit lifespan; distinguish liveness, readiness, and dependency degradation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-package-api-deployment-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-package-api-deployment-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_package_api_deployment_2(target_environments: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, lifecycle_smokes: int = 12, healthy_shutdowns: int = 12, leaked_credentials: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if target_environments < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_environments:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if lifecycle_smokes < 3 or healthy_shutdowns != lifecycle_smokes:
        return False, healthy_shutdowns, "lifecycle-gap"
    if leaked_credentials > 0:
        return False, leaked_credentials, "deployment-secret-leak"
    assert clean_installs == target_environments and healthy_shutdowns == lifecycle_smokes
    return True, healthy_shutdowns, "operable-agent-service"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

Build deterministic Python evidence to package the agent core, CLI and API with typed configuration, secret injection, async lifecycle, health, readiness, identity, and clean shutdown; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
